creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fernape
Date: Thu Mar 19 17:25:45 UTC 2020
New revision: 528735
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/528735

Log:
  net/reaver: Update to 1.6.6

  From ChangeLog: https://github.com/t6x/reaver-wps-fork-t6x/releases/tag/v1.6.6

   * improved bruteforce mode using .wpc save files.
   * automatic pixiewps pin retrieval and live injection in current session if
     pin is cracked before the timeout happens,
   * experimental uptime command line switch -u
   * lots of bugfixes and improvements

  PR:	244892
  Submitted by:	freebsd@sysctl.cz (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/net/reaver/Makefile
  head/net/reaver/distinfo
